titleStmt.title: SII 27.131: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 131. (A.R. No. 526 of 1929-30.) ADYAPĀḌI, MANGALORE TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up by the side of the Central shrine in the Ādināthēśvara temple.
This damaged record is dated Śaka 13[7]5, Śrīmukha, Vṛiśchika 1. The details of date, which cannot be verified for want of the weekday, correspond to 1453 A.D., October 30.

It registers gifts of land for feeding brahmaṇa in the sattra of the temple at Adiyapāḍi by several individuals represented by Binnaṇa Māraḷa when Biraṇa-rata alias Siṁga Māraluva was in charge of the administration of Koḍa-nāḍu. It refers to a certain Oḍeya (name lost) as the governor of a rājya which probably is the same as Maṅgalūrurājya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī gaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdra
cāmara cāravē . trayilōkya nagarāraṁbhaṁ mūlastaṁbhāya
śaṁbhavē . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śakavaruṣa 1375 saṁdu
vartamāna śrīmukha saṁvatsarada vriścikamāsa prathamaneyalu śrīmadrā
jādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīra pratāpa mallikārjunarā
ya mahārāyara rājyābhyudayadalu Avaranirūpa
rājyavanū Oḍeyaru Āḷuvakāla koḍanāḍa baya
lalū siṁgamarāḷuvarāda bīraṇarataru
nana bāḷikeyaliddu bāḷuvakāladalli Adiyapāḍiya dēvara
dēvastānadalū Ācaṁdrārkkastāyiyāgi māḍidasatradharṁmma
brāṁhmaṇa bhōjanada kaṭṭaḷeya vivara pratijana 1 kaṁ varuṣa 1 kaṁ bha
tta ba 30 lkeda mu 40 ṟalkedalū ja 7 kaṁ bhattaṁ mu 280 mattaṁ dvāda
śi tithiya brāṁhaṇa bhōjanada jana 6 kaṁ bhatta mu 20 Ubhaya
ṁ mu 300 kaṁ prativaruṣadalū naḍava bhattada kaḍutale bhūmiya
vivara kaṁdāralū semitila Ādināthadēvara dēvasva muḍi tāḍe beṭṭu baya
lu bittuva mu 10 Alliyakarinela teṁgina mara mane bāvi muṁtāda bā
ḷikeyiṁda satra dharṁmmada bhattamu 40 siḷtakaṁdāralū kuṁjata
vana maneya baḍagaṇa kuḷa kettimaru Aḍi 2 ḍakkaṁ Āṟu muḍi tāḍe
bhūmiyiṁdaṁ naḍava bhattaṁ mu 21 ba 15 kauḍūralū mayiṁ
dāḷuvana bagehosaḷake beṭṭuku 1 . yalū naḍava bhatta mu 1 ba 15
Ā cakka māraḷiyara dhaṁrma kōyapaḷiyalū yeraḍu muḍi tāḍe
peṭṭila bhūmiyiṁda talekaḷada pādamūli kuñaṇi naḍasuva bha
tta mu 5 dēvarāyana dharṁmma kōṭiya baḍaga yeraḍu mūḍe peṭṭi
la gaddeyiṁ bhataṁ mu 2 ba 15 yiśvara mulaṁṭada kuṁjōḍinalū
yeraḍu mūḍe hosaḷake beṭṭina gaddeyiṁ bhatta mu 4 ba 15 kuṁ
jattaṁ beṭṭina kuṁjattavana bāḷikeyiṁda naḍavabhatta mu 17 pejā
radalū kalaṁbitavanavara bāḷike nūjiyalu nāya reṁgāna 16 muḍi
tāḍe bhūmiyiṁda naḍava bhatta mu 6 ba 20 Arbiya Āliṁda teṁ
kalu hoha vugaṇasale nīratōḍiṁda paḍuvalu pādamūligaḷa bhūmi
yiṁ baḍaga beṭṭusaha mūḍalu teṁka muḍiya keḷagaṇa gaddesaha baḍaga ka
liṁbiya bāḷi 23 muḍi tāḍe Arbiya bhūmiyalu naḍava bhatta mū
ḍe 100 Atikāri śaṁkara yiṁdrāṇi saha taṁmaḍi bhāgada parivaḍeya pā
da mūlada bhūmiyiṁda naḍava bhattamu 20 deara paṭṭila nāraṁ ttiva
ru sahapāsēnapa viṣṇu pādamūlada bhūmiyiṁda naḍava bhattamu 21 mu
ḍakarevāsuva pādamūlada bhūmiyiṁda naḍavabhattamu 3 kallaṁbeṭṭu vāsuva
tiya pādamūlada bhūmiyiṁda naḍava bhattamu 4 Atikāriya
paṭṭilu muḍitāḍe bhūmiyiṁda modalaga yoḷa taṁma
ḍi naḍava bhattaṁ mu 3 ba 10 nāḍiṁjadalū mū 10 beṭṭu ye la
beḷe bittuva mu 6 mattaṁ paṭṭula bhūmi bittuva mu 100 U
bhayaṁ beṭṭuva bayalū 16 muḍitāḍe bhūmiyiṁ
tāda
ḷanū Adiyapāḍiya dēvara śrī saṁ
nidhiyali biṁnaṇa māruḷanu Oppisidanu halara ḍidu Ā dharṁmava O
pālisuvaru yi dharṁmada munūṟu muḍe bhattava taṁdu Aḍigeya
māḍuvātanu Ūṭadalli brāṁhaṇara saṁtōṣa baḍasi vīḷeyanu koṭṭu biraṇaṁ
tarige Āyuṣyā AbhiUraddhi Āgali sthānōttaravāgi vardhisaliyeṁdu
brāṁhmariṁda maṁtrākṣateyanikkisuvaru Āḷuva yala jananava bāḷuvavaru
yi dharṁmavamāḍi śilāśāsanava baraśidavarige sthānadharṁmagaḷa muṁdake naḍasi
pālisuvarige yiṣṭārthasiddhigaḷa Ādinātha dēvaru karuṇisuvaru yidharṁma kaḷu
pidavaru vāraṇāsiyali sahasrakapileya vadhistadōṣakke hōharu pālistava
ru saṁtāna paraṁpareyāgi bāḷi sukrutavanū EIduvaru śubhamastu .
Digital edition of SII 27.131 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
